text.title: Shift Log Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Shift Log Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: collect-state
step.action: Pull commits, incidents, decisions, blocked items active in the window.

step.name: group-and-summarise
step.action: Group by category; one-line each; mark severity.

step.name: name-pickup
step.action: Identify the single most important pickup item and write a ≤200-char pointer.
step.decision-gate: If pickup_first is generic or empty, STOP and rewrite.

step.name: scrub-secrets
step.action: Run secret-scan regex (AWS, GCP, Anthropic, JWT, generic API-key patterns).
step.decision-gate: If any pattern matches, replace with `<redacted>` and tag for review.

step.name: publish
step.action: Validate with the script; publish to the named channel; mark shift closed.
